def positive_python_perf_layer_memory_allocation_closure_or_lambda_allocated_in_inner_loop():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_memory_allocation_closure_or_lambda_allocated_in_inner_loop"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Memory allocation. Flag lambdas or closures allocated inside tight loops when a named function or hoisted callable works."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
